title: Body Drop 3D
description: The game will delight you with a realistic simulation of the body falling! Its advantage is not only physics, but also the realistic behavior of the character, his animations, nice graphics and many levels!

title: Slope Racing 3D
description:
Welcome to Slope Racing 3D!  It is a 3D running game with perfect controls, breath-taking speeds, and an addictive gameplay. 
How far can you go without reaching the floor? Try Slope Racing 3D, the more you play the game, the easier it is and the more enjoyable it is. Our goal in the game is to make the ball roll without falling on the surface of the inclined buildings.. Get ready for serious speed boost as you fall downhill the never-ending surface. Play Slope Racing 3D!

title: Moto X3M: Spooky Land
description: Drive your motorbike through Halloween-themed tracks filled with obstacles and stunt opportunities. Get your bike through the trials quickly to earn more points!

title: LOL Surprise Insta Party Divas
description: Welcome to the LOL Surprise Insta Party Divas. LOL girls heard about the surprise Insta party. They planned to try some new trends. But they need some hands to be perfect. Browse the girl’s wardrobe for perfect outfits and costumes. Before that pick some cute makeover for the girls. Play and have fun!

title: Basketball Stars
description:
Basketball Stars is a 2-player basketball game. In this game, you can play with your favorite team and play with basketball legends. In this game, you can either play with friends in 2-player mode or solo in single-player mode.
Show off your basketball skills and see if you can score a three-pointer or slam home an impressive dunk! You can play as many different legendary teams and try out both your defensive and offensive skills.

title: Drunken Boxing 2
description:
New game is live for boxing lovers! Drunken Boxing 2 offers a new gaming experience with renewed animations, effects and 3D graphics. Try to control the Drunken Boxers and throw quick punches at your opponent but watch out for your Energy Bar! If you run out of energy, it will take a while for you to recover. Make forward and backward moves, throw quick punches and win the match!

Drunken Boxing game has 1P and 2P modes. The first to reach a score of 5 in the game wins the match!

Game Controls:
PLAYER 1: "ARROW KEYS"
PLAYER 2: "W,A,S,D"

title: Among at Easter
description:
Play online or over local WiFi with 4-10 players as you attempt to prep your spaceship for departure, but beware as one will be an impostor bent on killing everyone!

Crewmates can win by completing all tasks or discovering and voting the impostor off the ship.

The Impostor can use sabotage to cause chaos, making for easier kills and better alibis.

title: Magikmon
description: Magikmon is an awesome RPG game in which you must capture different types of monsters. The magical world you live in is packed full with weird and wonderful monsters. You can use them to battle! Enjoy it!

title: Battle Simluator - Counter Stickman
description:
The stickmen must strike at the terror enemy stickmen in this Battle Simulator

The stickmen terror forces must be stopped with a tactical strike! You are the battle commander of the counter terrorist stickman (CTS) forces.

▶TABS simulator - style gameplay
▶3D stickmen, levels and gun models
▶Help win the stickman war.. on terror!
▶Accurate stickman tactics

Sounds: Freesound.org
Music_cornandbeans_generic_techno

title: Fractal Combat X
description:
FCX is an HTML5 action-packed flight combat game, sporting top notch 3D graphics, WebGL and a progressively intense gameplay!

MAIN FEATURES
- Exciting, fast-paced arcade flight combat action
- Top notch 3D graphics
- Unique gorgeous fractal landscapes
- Dozens of missions in Story mode
- New missions every day!
- Epic sound tracks
- Arcade and Simulator modes
- Cross-device

title: Funny Throat Surgery
description: Having a throat sore? Let the doctor see you! Cure the diseases on you gums, destroy all bacteries, and remove the infected amandels. Get some cute and funny dress up at the end of your journey to the doctor. It's important to be healthy and stylish!

title: Vangers HD
description: Mind-altering sandbox game that can be described as a racing role-playing adventure game with a complicated storyline. You’ll find a unique atmosphere, complete freedom and lots of gameplay hours to figure out what’s the game is all about.

title: Alpha Guns
description: Alpha Guns a 2D side scroller shooter with classic gameplay and unique mechanics. Play as a soldier from the Elite Force!

title: Foot Chinko
description: Défiez vos adversaires dans le tournoi de football le plus célèbre au monde. Serez-vous assez doué pour rafler toutes les récompenses des 90 niveaux du jeu ? Assez brave pour vous confronter au gardien de but surnommé le "gardien du diable" ? Nous verrons!

title: Football Masters
description: Football Masters Euro 2020 is a fun soccer game.  In this game, you can play as your favorite team and compete against other teams in challenging football matches; solo or together with your friends. Show your best ball kicking moves!

title: Red and Blue Stickman Huggy
description:
Are you ready for the adventure of two very cute brothers, namely blue and red stickman? Brothers red and blue need to get the key and reach the door. Be two people and get them to the door with your friend. reach the door and pass it to the new level. You will face multiple challenges but reach the door. 

How to Play?
*Move to WASD + Arrow Keys                  
*Double Jump available                  
*Mobile Touch Control

title: Pixel on Titan
description:
The titans is coming and attacking the city, you need to save the civilians in the city by killing all the titans in this beautiful pixel art game based on manga or anime attack on titan (AoT).

*This game will be updated periodically

Move Left = A   Move Right = D  Attack = F  Jump to Certain Direction = Left Mouse Click

title: Red Impostor vs. Crew
description: Red Imposter vs. Crew is a fun and engaging Action game. Your mission is simple: Execute all living crewmates in the spaceship. Let no one survive.

title: Cut the Rope 2
description: Cut the Rope 2 reprend les éléments qui ont fait le succès du premier volet, tout en ajoutant de nouveaux défis et des obstacles inattendus pour le plus grand bonheur des millions de fans aux quatre coins du globe ! Vous avez aimé Cut the Rope ? Vous allez adorer Cut the Rope 2!

title: Bomber Friends
description: Fais exploser tes amis et remporte le match en étant le dernier survivant! Ramasse les bonus pour obtenir des bombes toujours plus puissantes! Utilise les bombes explosives pour souffler tes amis à travers toute la carte!

title: Poly Art
description: Des dizaines d'animaux, de plantes, de véhicules, de fleurs et plus encore. Voilà ce qui vous attend dans cette œuvre d'art absolument fantastique et relaxante. Assemblez de belles images à partir de fragments et complétez tous les segments du jeu.

title: 1941 Frozen Front
description: Menez les forces allemandes lors de la poussée vers l'Est ou défendez la mère patrie du côté soviétique. Choisissez la bonne tactique de guerre et gagnez vos galons en commandant de manière ingénieuse dans FROZEN FRONT ! Découvrez des batailles de la seconde guerre mondiale époustouflantes dans la toute nouvelle simulation militaire et STRATÉGIQUE de HandyGames™!

title: Cut The Rope
description: Vous avez reçu un mystérieux paquet, et le petit monstre à l’intérieur n’a envie que d’une chose… de BONBONS ! Collectez les étoiles dorées, découvrez les prix cachés et débloquez de nouveaux niveaux dans ce jeu addictif acclamé par la critique et au moteur physique réaliste!

title: My Sugar Factory
description: My Sugar Factory is a turn-based game about managing a sugar factory. Start with one sugar cane bush and earn millions! Buy a factory and open a laboratory to improve the sugar cane variety.

title: Cut the Rope Experiments
description: Le petit monstre vert Om Nom est de retour et il est plus affamé que jamais! Faites équipe avec le Professeur, un savant un peu fou (mais pas voyou!) résolu à étudier le goût prononcé de Om Nom pour les bonbons à l'aide d'expérimentations en tout genre. Dévoiler les prix cachés et déverrouiller de nouveaux niveaux!

title: Flip Goal
description:
Aim the ball to hit the goal! Time your kick perfectly without touching any other soccer players. Pick up your favourite team!

As you progress, you’ll collect coins to upgrade your soccer stadium and get new soccer balls!

Win the soccer tournament, collect keys and open chests for more coins!

Become the world champion! With easy controls, Flip Goal gives you a whole new level of soccer experience.

title: Dash Masters
description:
Les règles sont simples. Touchez l'écran pour sauter tous azimuts et faites glisser votre doigt vers le haut pour exécuter un Rush.

Il y a 20 ans, les extraterrestres ont attaqué. Des milliards d'innocents ont péri.

Quelques-uns d'entre nous sont parvenus à échapper in extremis à ce massacre systématique ! Nous nous sommes alors cachés et avons tout mis en œuvre pour créer la seule et unique arme qui nous permettrait de libérer la Terre et d'anéantir cette race d'aliens artificiels que nous avons surnommée les Robots.

Équipé de l'exo-armure C-31, vous tenterez l'impossible : infiltrer les tours offensives des extraterrestres et les démolir. Utilisez vos propulseurs pour détruire les Robots gardiens et frayez-vous un chemin à travers les défenses ennemies.

title: Tower Crush
description:
Tower Crush is an epic indie game where you build 1 tower, up to 6 floors, load them with weapons, upgrade, evolve and defeat your opponents in fantastic battles. A combination of action and strategy!

Don't fear, you’ll collect Machine Guns, Cannons, Flame Guns, Bomb Launchers, Shockwaves, Rocket Launchers, Lasers, Teslas, Ice Cannons and Mighty Plasma Cannons to help defend your tower. Unleash the most devastating special powers upon your enemies in this Combat Game.

title: LOL Surprise Fresh Spring Look
description: Welcome to the LOL Surprise Fresh Spring Look.  LOL Suprise Girls have some plans for welcoming their favorite season spring. They already filled their cupboard with new spring fashion. But they have a dilemma is to choose the best outfits. Browse the wardrobe and pick the suitable outfits for each one.

title: Swipy Basketball
description:
Swipy Basketball is the new basketball game you can play on any device! Swipe the balls towards the hoop and reach an higher score.
Collect stars to unlock new skins. Improve your skills and become the master of Swipy Basketball!

title: Superbike Hero
description: Compete across Europe and the Middle East as you race in the Superbike Series. Boost between opponents, hang-on around tight corners, collect coins and upgrade your superbike for the next race. Are you the Superbike Hero?

title: God of Light
description:
nstallez-vous confortablement et immergez-vous corps et âme au cœur du monde de God of Light, un jeu lumineux qui va en faire voir de toutes les couleurs à votre matière grise ! 
Avec son extraordinaire gameplay qui met l’accent sur l’exploration, ses visuels splendides et sa bande-son génialissime signée UNKLE (le géant de la musique électronique), ce titre fait exploser les fondations du puzzle-game et repousse les lois de la physique vidéoludique pour offrir une expérience purement et simplement hors-norme !

title: Rabbit Samurai 2
description: Throw the rope and swing around to find all little bees and bring them back home.

title: Helix Blitz
description: Helix Blitz, the ultimate arcade game where you need to move the ball of paint down the helixes! Try to avoid the helixes and enter the cool Blitz mode!

title: Drag Racing Club
description: Entrez dans le monde passionnant des courses de dragsters dans ce jeu unique. Commencez comme outsider inconnu et frayez-vous un chemin jusqu'au sommet. Prouvez à tout le monde que vous êtes le meilleur pilote de la ville. Pour y parvenir, vous devrez acheter ou gagner les superbes voitures de vos adversaires. Ensuite tunez-les pour en faire des bolides puissants. En piste !

title: Babel Tower
description:
You are building the Tower of Babel, that will reach to the sky!
You have a team of professionals: miners, masons, crafters, lumberjacks, builders, who will help you achieve success in this incremental idle game.

New fun machines are unlocked with every tower floor.

The game was made by Airapport and expands our idle games universe. 

Controls
Press-and-hold on the screen to mine stone, transfer stone to processing, speed up bricks creation, chop trees, and perform other activities.

Sell part of your resources at the Market to gain money for upgrades. At certain upgrade level the building works by itself, you will be spectating and having fun.

Restarting your tower building gives you Golden Bricks, which boost your tap power, production and increase market prices.

If you are away you are earning time bonus, which can be used to speed up game processes.

Buy special artifacts to boost your progress even further.

title: Supermarket Expert Idle
description:
A new Supermarket idle adventure is now beginning with the experts of this job. You have just opened a new supermarket in your town and you should manage there. There are lots of customers visiting your supermarket daily. You can earn good money and you can open new departments inside your supermarket. More departments mean more income. Don't forget to do your upgrades within the upgrade menu. You can buy helpers and do your work faster. Let the Supermarket Expert Idle adventure begin!

How to play?
Move: "ARROW KEYS" or "W,A,S,D" or "MOUSE" and "LEFT-CLICK"

Pick products from the places where they grow up or are produced and place them inside their departments and check out customers on the counter and earn money.

title: Basket Champs
description: Basket Champs is the brand new game from the developer of Foot Chinko. Select your basketball team and play in World Championship.

title: Funny Shooter - Destroy all enemies
description:
Choose your weapon from the 18 available. Protect yourself from the invasion of enemies. Enemies differ in size and ability. Avoid enemy grenades and pitchforks. Dodge blows from clubs, axes, and chainsaws. Destroy enemies with a grenade launcher and a bazooka. Shoot them with machine guns and pistols. Destroy them all !!!       
       
Features:       
- beautiful graphics       
- a variety of weapons       
- addictive gameplay       
- driving music and great sound effects

title: Skyblock
description: Minecraft - SkyBlock Description Skyblock is a popular challenge, where the player starts the game in a small island in the void, including a tree and often a chest, which contains items you couldn't get without it. WASD or arrows Mouse or Touch

title: Stock Car Hero
description: Compete across North America as you race in the Stock Car Series. Dodge traffic, boost around banked corners, collect coins and upgrade your car for the next race. Are you the Stock Car Hero the world needs?

title: Mr Santa Run 2
description: mr santa run 2 is a html5 arcade game, run and avoid enemy, collect star to earn score

title: Street Ball Jam
description: A one-touch basketball arcade game with an endless gameplay. Unlock all balls, earn crystals to open extra courts and enjoy Street Ball Jam!

title: Castel War 3D
description:
Defeat the opponent by collecting the balls and make troops. 

Let’s join the epic fight 3d simulator, fight like the strongest army clash in the town to defend your castle fight from the extreme fighting and crazy enemies. It is your duty to claim your legacy as a big hero warrior, assemble your epic clash army troops, get them ready for 3d battle view and destroy the enemy stick army of and become the master of the 3d battle view. Defend your gang clash castle fight as a big battle hero of your town.

title: Ultimate Flying Car
description:
Do you want to take fast rides and flights on the long streets of the city? Ultimate Flying Car game invites you to realistic flying car simulator experience. Explore the sky with stylish flying cars, or unlock new cars by participating in races. You can play all of these game modes either 1 player or 2 player.

Player 1:
Move: "W,A,S,D"
NOS: "SHIFT  "
Look back: "T"
Fix car's position: "R"
Handbrake: "SPACE"

Player 2:
Move: "ARROW KEYS"
NOS: "M"
Look back: "L"
Fix car's position: "U"
Handbrake: "K"

title: Bouncy Dunk
description: Get ready, shoot, score and WIN: Bouncy Dunk will make your excitement grow! Test your skills by winning all the challenges and unlock special basketballs to grow your power and style! Become a Bouncy Champion NOW!

title: Metal Animals
description: Appelez les Metal Animals à la rescousse! Prenez le contrôle d'une escouade de petits animaux à fourrure aussi mignons que déterminés et défendez votre Tank face à l'ennemi!

title: Dark Lands
description: Frayez-vous un chemin au travers de hordes de squelettes, de trolls et affrontez les terribles scorpions et minotaures. Améliorez votre héros pour venir à bout du monde aventure et survivre au mode infini. Courez pour votre survie!

title: Foot Chinko World Cup
description: Foot Chinko World Cup features a different take on soccer games with a unique blend of pachinko and pinball. As fun as soccer can get!

title: Deadswitch 3
description: Deadswitch 3 is a fast-paced 2D multiplayer shooter with plenty of game modes, maps, and weapons!

title: Monster Go
description: Les Pokémonstres ne sont heureux qu'à deux ! Reliez-les à de l'énergie pour les activer. Amusez-vous avec ce jeu de casse-têtes simple mais addictif. N'oubliez pas de remplir le plateau de jeu de courant pour rendre les Pokémonstres heureux et gagner 3 étoiles. Les flux d'énergie ne peuvent ni se croiser ni se chevaucher.

title: Penalty Shooters
description: 2 joueurs, un ballon et un but - la guerre des penalty peut commencer ! Résisterez-vous à la pression des milliers de supporters pour gagner la coupe de ce jeu de foot hyper excitant ? Choisissez parmi 32 équipes et devenez le plus grand champion de tous les temps!

title: Masquerades vs Impostors
description:
The man in the red and blue mask needs to escape from the spaceship? you must help them. watch out, only red colored impostors with red masks can kill. Likewise with the blue mask. Anyone can kill their own color. watch out for zombies, kill them too.

How to Play?
*Played with WASD + Arrow Keys.  
*Mobile touch control is available.  
*double jump available  
*jump on it to kill!

title: Drunken Duel
description: Drunken Duel is an entertaining western game with physics-based one-button control that can be played as two people and one person. In the game, two drunk rag dolls duel. You can hit the chance serial target by firing randomly, but you can lose by playing this way. It is possible to take more professional shots by mastering the physics of the game after a few games. The sounds and visual effects in the game make the game more fun.

title: Push Noob
description:
Push Noob - is an amazing simulator game about a dancing Noob and his fall. Join the earning of diamonds for pumping Noob and opening new locations.
Throw snowballs at Noob and get diamonds for his collisions! Unlock new levels and skins! Compete in the amount of diamonds earned!

title: Special Strike Zombies
description: You are special forces soldier and your mission is to use big arsenal of weapons to shoot hordes of zombies and mercenaries, choose suitable weapon for each wave of enemies in order to survive and successfully complete each level.

title: Little Alchemy
description: Libérez votre pouvoir créatif! Commencez avec les quatre éléments de base et utilisez-les pour trouver des dinosaures, des licornes et des vaisseaux spatiaux!

title: Cut the Rope: Magic
description: Rejoins la dernière aventure d'Om Nom et transforme ce charmant petit monstre par magie pour l'aider à récupérer ses bonbons volés par un sorcier magique! Un incident magique a accidentellement téléporté Om Nom vers un monde mystique rempli d'énigmes complexes pour des joueurs de tous les âges. Sauras-tu utiliser les nouvelles compétences d'Om Nom pour déjouer les ruses et pièges d'un sorcier maléfique?

title: Geometrical Dash
description: Contrôlez un carré et arrivez à la fin, c'est tout ! Mais ce n'est pas aussi facile. Les niveaux que vous traverserez sont des labyrinthes de pixels conçus pour tester vos réflexes. La seule chose que vous devez faire, c'est sauter, sauter, et sauter encore au son de la musique ! Alors plongez dans ce jeu et goûtez au rythme de ce jeu délicat !

title: King Rugni Tower Defense
description: A classic Tower Defense game with lots of enemies and territories to conquer. Join King Rügni on his epic adventure against hordes of elementals.

title: Baby Hazel Bed Time
description: Stars are twinkling in the sky and night seems beautiful in moonlight. Baby Hazel is now ready to go to bed but before that she needs to brush her teeth and take a shower. Help Hazel in carrying her bedtime activities. Make a bed for her and pamper the little girl by telling her interesting stories. If bad dream scares Hazel, pamper her with kisses and playing lullabies.

title: Master Chess Multiplayer
description:
"Use the most effective strategies to defeat the computer or real players from all over the world in this classic game for all time.

The goal of the game is to capture your opponent's king. This is done by moving the pieces on the board.

Who will be the first to say ""Checkmate"".

To make a move, click on the shape and drag it to the desired position."

title: Stacky Dash Nail
description: Nail Stack is an hyper casual arcade game available on the web. This game focuses on stacking fingernails. The longer the nails, the bigger the reward for each level.

title: Basketball Master
description: Un défi pour les vrais joueurs de basket et de streetball ! Sautez avec le ballon et faites un panier dans le délai imparti. Obtenez le meilleur score et collectez des pièces. Débloquez tous les ballons et lieux. Essayez 2 modes de jeu. Il vous faudra un timing précis, viser juste et un peu de chance.

title: Funny Rescue Pet
description: Lica and Purry had an accident! Lica's house is on fire, and Purry is soak wet when she played inside the wall. How can it happen? Rescue them immediately and also give them some makeover!

title: Bois d'Arc: Bow Shooting
description: Défendez votre château contre des forces obscures qui tentent de violer inimaginables ses puissants murs. Choisir l'un des trois royaumes arc de tir de héros dans ce jeu de tir arc super addictif et bourré d'action. Bois D'Arc déjà a déjà été joué par des millions sur les nombreux sites de jeu différents. Par conséquent VascoGames est fier de vous présenter la version complète mobile de ce jeu de tir à l'arc, choisissez votre héros et prendre les forces de mal sur la tête!

title: Kobadoo Flags
description:
Kobadoo Flags is a browser game that trains your brain by memorizing flags of the World in the right order.

When you play Kobadoo Flags you are actively using your working memory. Several scientific studies suggest that training of working memory has beneficial effects and can increase your cognitive functions.

title: Halloween Horror Massacre
description: Halloween approche à grands pas, tout comme les nuits d'hiver froides et effrayantes ! Les horribles monstres ont aussi froid la nuit, alors ils doivent ajouter du bois à la chaudière. En plus de couper des têtes, ils doivent couper du bois ! Mais attention, leurs branches sont aussi dirigées vers vous ! Coupez autant de bûches que possible de l'arbre tout en évitant les branches qui approchent ! Changez de position pour éviter le danger. Avez-vous ce qu'il faut pour gagner la médaille d'or ?

title: Killer Escape Huggy
description:
you are a murderer! And you have to kill all your teammates kill them all. Hunt down all your teammates and unleash the killer emotion inside the blue huggy. Only you can see the karambit in your hand, don't forget they're all dead secretly, hide, come out and kill the killer Huggy!  

How to Play?
Use Arrow keys to move.  
Mobile control available.  
Kill all your teammates.  
Kill everyone before time runs out.

title: Red Impostor Guys
description:
Red impostor guys Welcome to the Game World!
Finish dozens of courses and collect crowns. Be the winner of the day! Buy the costumes and your image has been changed. Race with 10-40 people, be the winner of the race! Join the world of Fall Days. Race with different costumes on different maps! Make the Difference.
10 Maps
20 Uniform Costumes
A completely different mechanic is waiting for you!

How to Play?
WASD + ZQSD + Arrow Keys And Mobile Touch Controls

title: Death Run
description: This game is an adventure game. You have thousands of lives in your hands. The game is full of various agencies. As the controller of the agency, you can repel all people and avoid passing.

title: Night City Racing
description:
Night City has been prepared for the night races with this great car simulator game! It is time to challenge your opponents and prove to them you are the most skillful driver of all time. The best side of this adventure is to be played in both single player and in two player game modes. You can pick between various cars and you can customize these cars in the shop and you can have great moments while flying or while racing or while driving for free. Let the super Night City adventure begin!

How to play? 

If playing single:
Move: "W,A,S,D" or "ARROW KEYS"
NOS: "L-SHIFT" or "R-SHIFT"
Restart car position: "R"
Look back: "T"
Change camera view: "C"

If playing two player:
Player 1:
Move: "ARROW KEYS"
NOS: "M"
Restart car position: "O"
Look back: "P"
Change camera view: "K"

Player 2:
Move: "W,A,S,D"
NOS: "L-SHIFT"
Restart car position: "R"
Look back: "T"
Change camera view: "C"

title: Hunters and Props
description:
Hunt or be hunted in this fun first-person shooter game! Pretend that you are one of the props or play as the hunter in Hunter and Props!

Hunter and Props is a first-person multiplayer shooter game where the team is divided into two: the hunter, and the props. Playing as the hunter is quite easy, your goal is to shoot other players that are pretending to be the props and should not miss. Playing as one of the props is a bit tricky as you have to be both patient and cunning with your disguise. Remember the saying that the "best way to hide a tree is in the forest" and keep your disguise perfect. Good luck and have fun!

title: Smart Looter
description: Be quick and sneaky and grab tons of loots! Watch out for the patrols and become the king of thieves!

title: Red Stickman vs Monster School
description: Stickman vs Monster School - is a perfect game for the lovers of Red And Blue Stickman Adventure! The Stick Adventure is an addictive platform fighting game, where you have to control characters. Participate in the Monster School challenge together with the Red Stickman.

title: Wounded Winter A Lakota Story
description:
About
Wounded Winter: A Lakota Story is a free action / shooter western game with a beautiful low poly graphic.
Story
The hero of the story is called Akecheta, who is a Lakota(Native American). The Akecheta tribe is attacked and its people are killed while he is hunting. The attackers also took Akecheta's wife with them. Akecheta embarks on a perilous journey to bring his wife back and avenge the murderers of his tribe.
Features:

    Beautiful low poly style graphic
    Strong native American protagonist
    Fun and exciting action/shooter gameplay
    Easy to pick up and play
    For fans of western and action games

title: 10 Blocks
description: 10 Blocks puzzle game is addicting brain tester game play. You need to place the given blocks on grid, while trying to fill up with grid rowscolumns blocks will disappear when are filled up horizontally or vertically. Always plan for next move because some blocks are not easy to fit in. You can use GRAVITY BUTTON once. Use it if you feeling stuck.

title: Angry Gran
description: Play the game that began the Angry Gran series and take to the streets and whack those punk neighbors!

title: Baby Hazel Backyard Party
description: Baby Hazel was busy watching her favorite TV show, suddenly she got an idea of backyard party. She will be hosting the party first time, so she needs your help in decorating the venue and making all other necessary arrangements for the gathering. Play the game to help Hazel in organizing the party and also make sure guests are served properly.

title: Russian Car Drift 3D
description: Russian Car Drift 3D is an HTML5 3D driving game that challenges you to get rid of the snow in each level using nothing but your crazy Russian vehicle. To do so, just skid & drift non-stop. The more you drift, the better! Drift in an old or new Russian car!

title: Zombie Can't Jump
description: Préparez-vous à l'invasion des zombies! Prenez vos armes, votre kit de construction et ne laissez pas les zombies vous mettre K.O! Organisez votre défense: TNT, pieux ou encore nids de mitrailleuses, récupérez de nouvelles armes surpuissantes et libérez votre fureur pour survivre!

title: Draw Save Puzzle
description: Le modèle de jeu Draw Save Puzzle est un modèle de projet complet qui est un jeu de puzzle 2D.

title: Tic Tac Toe Mania
description: Tic Tac Toe Mania est un excellent moyen de passer votre temps. Arrêtez de gaspiller du papier et sauvez les arbres. Jouez à Tic Tac Toe Mania sur votre appareil et profitez de nombreuses heures de divertissement seul ou avec vos amis.

title: Grand Prix Hero
description: Compete across multiple continents as you race in the Grand Prix Series. Dodge traffic, boost at high speeds, collect coins and upgrade your car for the next race. Are you the Grand Prix Hero?

title: Boss Level - Pumpkin Madness
description: Enjoy this Halloween version of the Boss Level Shootout original game. Billy boy fell into a retro game console and is now fighting the boss!

title: Battboy Adventure
description: “Battboy Adventure” is a platform game, where the hero must overcome all the levels by dodging the thorns and eliminating the villains (killer clowns). Collect all the stars to complete the game 100%. The graphics are colorful, cartoonized and beautiful. Altogether, there are 08 levels that increase the difficulty as the player goes through each one.

title: Flamit
description:
Light all the torches as fast as you can in this engaging platform.
But do it fast, because a your flame won't last forever!
Featuring:
- 30 one-screen levels full of funny obstacles
- 2 Different game mode
- spikes
- ice enemies
- more spikes
- snow
- A lot of torches

Controls
Touch the screen controls or use arrow keys to move the Player

- 30 one-screen levels full of funny obstacles
- 2 Different game mode
- spikes
- ice enemies
- more spikes
- snow
- A lot of torches

title: Robo-Butcher
description:
A human outpost was attacked by an army of robots out of control, but it's not over yet! The human resistance has an
ultimate weapon to counteract the advance of the crazy robots: the Robo-butcher, a robot made with the sole purpose of protecting humans from other robots.

Features:

Lots and lots of enemies
Power-ups
Perma-uprgrades
Double-jump 
Old-style pre-rendered graphics
Robots
Fantastic BGM by Nosebreed

title: Piano Tiles Game
description: Get the best score on Piano Tiles!

title: DD Blocky
description:
Blocky is a fun and addictive puzzle game that you can match the blocks with drag & drop on the puzzle board. Play this game and strengthen your mind. game shapes are like the tetris shapes.

FEATURES:
Age Rating: 8 and Up
Responsibility: Portrait
Game Mode: Single-Player
Controls: Mouse / Touch

title: Baby Bear
description: Maman ours et papa ours sont très excités à l'idée d'avoir un petit ourson à la maison. Mais comme c'est leur tout premier bébé, ils sont un peu stressés et ont besoin d'être aidés dans leur rôle de parents. Saurez-vous être leur guide?

title: Fruit Blaster
description: Soyez rapide et précis ! C'est tout ce que vous avez besoin de savoir pour exceller dans "Fruit Blaster"! Touchez ou cliquez pour couper les fruits, et enchainez les "slice" pour débloquer des combos et exploser les high scores! Devenez un véritable ninja!

title: Super Chains
description:
Super Chains a fun puzzle game.
To capture and use them, create long links of chain blocks by simply touching an adjoining block that is one number higher, lower, or of the same value.
Powerful mythical creatures are hidden in this super numbers puzzle game! Get powerful Heroes to help you in your task!
Can you be the EPIC champion??

title: Pigeon Bomber
description: Jack le pigeon a peur des gens. La peur mène à la colère. La colère mène à la haine. Et la haine mène aus fientes! Jack survole la ville et son but est de déféquer sur tout et tout le monde!

title: Kobadoo Shapes
description:
Kobadoo Shapes is a browser game that trains your brain by memorizing coloured geometric shapes in the right order.

When you play Kobadoo Shapes you are actively using your working memory. Several scientific studies suggest that training of working memory has beneficial effects and can increase your cognitive functions.

Full version: https://www.kobadoo.com

title: Badland
description: BADLAND est un jeu primé d'aventure-action à défilement horizontal qui se déroule dans une magnifique forêt luxuriante, remplie de drôles d'habitants, de fleurs et d'arbres. Bien que la forêt ait l'air de sortir tout droit d'un conte de fées, l'atmosphère semble vraiment très étrange... Vous contrôlez l'un des habitants de la forêt pour découvrir ce qui s'y passe. Tout au long de votre périple, vous découvrirez tout un tas de pièges et d'obstacles plus ingénieux les uns que les autres.

title: Squid Race
description: Squid Raceis a squid game specially designed to be fully-featured sugar game. Survive race, Carve dalgona honeycomb cookie, cross glass bridge and tug of war

title: Face Breaker
description:
Face Breaker is an enjoyable puzzle game where you are a paddle
Destroy all the blocks using your happy paddle to hit your square-face-ball, like in a weird tennis match!
Hit and destroy all the blocks as soon as you can.
After any bounce the ball gains speed, making it harder and harder to intercept it!
If the ball falls on the bottom you lose!
Beat all the 45 engaging levels if you can!
You will face (not pan intended) a lot of difficult challenges! Prepare yourself!

title: Ski King 2022
description: La saison de ski commence, alors venez skier dans ce jeu aux commandes intuitives et simples. Dévalez la pente, récupérez des pièces, améliorez vos compétences et devenez le roi du ski. Pouvez-vous échapper à l'avalanche aussi ?

title: Tiny Tomb
description:
C'est le type de jeu qui va te transporter :

Quatre mondes éthérés magnifiquement rendus flottent aux confins de l'univers. Pour sauver tes amis, tu devras tous les visiter... en veillant à souvent nourrir un monstre goinfre au tempérament difficile !

(Au cours de ton périple, essaie également de comprendre ce qui contrarie tant Birdman...)

Tiny Tomb propose un univers rogue-like avec notamment :
- une histoire loufoque avec des personnages sympathiques et décalés.
- un voxel-art classique et touchant
- des animations en stop-motion
- Des tombes en perpétuelle évolution
- Plus de 25 objets à collecter
- 4 mondes tout droit sortis d'un rêve et n'attendant qu'une chose : que tu les explores

L'amusement t'attend dans ce jeu dynamique et facile à prendre en main. Idéal pour de longues sessions de jeu ou des parties éclair !

title: Chess 2D
description:
Play Chess in 2D mode against the computer.

Chess 2D assist with all possible Chess moves, with a green indication for a valid move, with a blue indicator for En Passant and Castling, a yellow indicator indicating a move that is not allowed because the Chess piece, King is in danger if the move were to be valid, and a red indication of the Chess piece, King when in danger.

The space or square once selecting a Chess piece will lit up accordingly, and give a clear indication like real life robotic colours, green means go, orange means warning and red means danger.

title: Mixed World Weekend
description: Welcome to Mixed World, the cheerful platform puzzle game! Use your funny friends’ special skills to nudge all monsters off the platforms!

title: Zombie Road
description: Un monde post-apocalyptique dangereux plein de zombies où seuls les conducteurs les plus courageux et les plus expérimentés tentent de survivre en affrontant d'innombrables armées des morts-vivants. Un jeu de course palpitant. Le plaisir de conduire et d'exterminer des zombies.

title: Princess Hair Spa Salon
description: Princess Hair Salon, Makeovers & Hair Spa Salon for brides, teenage girls, stars and celebrities. Hundreds of hair style, makeup, clothes, and accessories to choose from! Let's play the Hair Salon . To be a barber and design various hairstyles for your customer. Share your Princess with friends and family! Unlock more ways to dress up your Prom Princess, there’s no limit!

title: EVO City Driving
description: EVO City Driving features realistic graphics and big variety of super cars to drive across the evo city, drive as fast as you can and try to explore every road in town.

title: Knife Smash
description: Vous aimez lancer des trucs ? Comme des couteaux sur des cibles mouvantes ? Alors voici le défi ultime pour vous ! Synchronisez vos coups, visez bien et devenez le maître du couteau ! Pouvez-vous terminer tous les niveaux ? Un gameplay très simple mais qui est difficile à maîtriser ! Pourrez-vous collectionner tous les couteaux ridicules ?

title: Baby Hazel Fun Time
description: Baby Hazel enjoyed a nightlong sleep with sweet dreams. She woke up happily this morning and ready to enjoy her day. Help her in getting fresh and then feed her with lukewarm water. Make her fun hours more playful by offering toys of her choice. Enjoy having fun with Hazel and keep her happy by fulfilling all her needs.

title: Cake Shop Cafe Pastries & Waffles cooking Game
description:
This cake shop game is specially made for you guys. In the cake making game, you will be allowed to prepare different cakes for the customers. Make different bakery items in your own cake factory and sell them to the customers in this free cooking game. Earn lots of coins in this dessert shop game and unlock other cake shops included in the free kitchen game. In the shop management game, I hope you can handle all the customers in my bakery shop with many power-ups and targets. You will have three food truck game experience in a single gameplay area. So get this addictive game right now, make delicious cakes and dessert, and sell them to the customers in cake mania. This free chef game includes your own baker shop where you need to serve all the cake lover and dessert lover, customers. Earn lots of coins in my cafe shop, upgrade all the cooking appliances and use different power-ups to complete different challenging levels.

This one baker shop is one of the best bakery games for free. You just need to serve those customers who come to your cake food truck. Make lots of coins to purchase boosters and upgrades. Unlock all the food truck in the serving game and enjoy serving different recipes to match the taste with all the customers.

# Key Features

- Delicious Desserts To Cook & Serve In Different Food Trucks
- Different Food Trucks For Variety Of Play areas
- Number Of Upgrades To Increase The Cooking Speed
- Handle So Many Customers At Your Food Truck
- Use Number Of Awesome Power Up To Excite Your Gameplay
- Complete Daily Challenge And Earn Rewards
- Get Unexpected Daily Rewards During The Play area
- Certain Goals Have To Be Achieved To Complete The Level
- Upgrade Your Tools To Perform Faster

All those who love to make cakes, this is the best cake making game to match customer interest. Cake shop great pastries & waffle cooking game will entertain you for lots of hours. Do share it with your friends and family.

title: Icy Purple Head 2
description: Icy slides , Purple sticks. Touch anywhere to become icy, try to reach the postage box to finish the level and void dangerous spikes and electricity!

title: Rope Bowing Puzzle
description: Rope Bowing Puzzle is an interesting and addictive puzzle game. It looks easy enough, but you also have to concentration and dodge some obstacles that will make it difficult for you.

title: Green and Blue Cuteman
description:
In the green and blue cuteman game played for two, you are two players as green and blue and you must reach the flag by passing through obstacles and defeating the enemies. reach the flag pass the level!

How to Play?
WASD + Arrow keys & Mobile Touch Control 
Pause "P"

title: Penalty Challenge
description:
"Penalty Challenge Multiplayer is a Sport Game.

Select between 32 different teams your favorite one.

You have 5 attempts to pass the goalie and other 5 to save your opponent’s kicks!

It’s all in your hands and feet!

Two Game Modes:

 - Play against the computer in tournament mode!

 - Challenge a friend playing online multiplayer!"

title: Baby Hazel Annual Day
description: Wow! Annual Day is organized at Baby Hazel's preschool. Baby Hazel has decided to dress up in clown outfits. First of all assist Hazel and mom in purchasing the required costume and accessories. Then dress her in clown costumes and apply attractive makeup shades to her. Finally, on Annual Day help Hazel and friends to perform onstage without getting nervous. Enjoy celebrating Annual Day with Baby Hazel and friends!

title: Tiger Run
description: Very exciting and interesting tiger parkour game, as fun as subway parkour

title: Squidgames 3D
description:
Here is the Squid Game!
You will be playing Red Light, Green Light.

You are allowed to move forward when ‘it’ shouts out, ‘Green Light’, stop when ‘it’ shouts, ‘Red Light’.
If your movement is detected afterwards, you will be eliminated.
Let me repeat the rule.
You are allowed to move forward when ‘it’ shouts out, ‘Green Light’, stop when ‘it’ shouts, ‘Red Light’.
Those players who cross the finish line without being eliminated within the playtime will pass this round.

title: Amaze Escape
description: Un jeu hyper-décontracté passionnant de logique et d'ingéniosité. Le joueur doit résoudre un puzzle simple et sortir de prison.

title: Canjump
description: Canjump is a game in which you can only jump, but you have to do it at the right time.

title: Noob vs Zombie
description: Welcome to Noob vs Zombie. Go through labyrinths of biomes with different zombies and enemies. Pro betrayed Noobik and left him in labyrinths with various zombies. Go through mysterious labyrinths defeating zombies in deadly battles. You need to go through the labyrinths in each biome in order to find Pro and fight with him, while the cheater with his insidious technologies will interfere with you. Collect coins, buy weapons and upgrade. Super entertaining gameplay: beat zombies and skeletons, beat inhabitants of biomes, earn coins and level up. All characters give coins and values. Open chests with mysterious items and gold. Do you have the courage to go through all the biomes with zombies and bosses and fight with Pro and Cheater. Go through villages, caves, deserts and the North Pole, dodge traps, escape enemies and solve riddles.

title: Noob Huggy Kissiy
description:
You must help them survive in the jungle and get home. Huggy and Kissiy miss their home so much and there are many dangers on the way to go home. It's snowing and it's getting cold. They need to watch out for the enemies in the snowy forest. You have to watch out for the bees and slime or you may die. Complete 10 different maps and reach home.

How to Play?
*Move to WASD + Arrow Keys                 
*Double Jump available                 
*Mobile Touch Control

title: Beach Bowling 3D
description: Beach Bowling 3D is a game where you can test your bowling skills on summer beach in gorgeous 3D. Defeat opponents in hundreds of levels. Or just play with your friends on one device. Just throw the ball and get a score. Very easy to start, but hard to master.

title: Puppets Cemetery
description:
Shoot as many puppets as you can in this top down shooter full of pumpkins!

WASD or ARROW KEYS to move the player
MOUSE to aim and shoot
RMB / E / SPACEBAR to pick up weapons

title: Checkers Legend
description: Le jeu de plateau classique et très simple que tout le monde connaît depuis son enfance. Il existe de nombreuses variantes, alors les règles sont fournies dans le jeu. Vous pouvez jouer simplement contre l'IA ou utiliser cette application pour jouer contre un ami sur le même appareil.

title: Funny Hair Salon
description: George's hair is in a no bueno situation. His scalp is full of mites and pimps. The only way to fix his hair is going to the salon. Let's cure his scalp and plant new hair to his head, so he can show his true outter beauty!

title: Knife io
description: Knife.io is a multiplayer game. In the game, you can win by killing everyone. In the game, find a way to avoid the enemy’s attack. While killing the enemy, you will get different random skills to strengthen your attack power. Note that the game map will shrink automatically over time, hurry up and enter the experience, I wish you a happy game!

title: Hockey Hero
description: Choose your hero and compete against 3 fierce opponents in the Ice Hockey event. Avoid the attacking players to approach the goal line. Once in front of the goal time your shot to score! Will you win a Gold Medal by scoring in all 3 periods? Be a Hockey Hero!

title: Just Golf
description: Just Golf combines minimalism with puzzle in 210 levels with gradual difficulty. You must drop the ball into the hole with the red flag. The plays are unlimited and you'll have guided aim to facilitate your shots. You can also use your skill to try to collect the 3 stars in each level!

title: Galaxy Warriors
description:
"Combattez avec votre vaisseau ! Parcourez la galaxie et tirez sur des flottes extraterrestres ennemies. Récupérez des crédits pour améliorer votre vaisseau spatial.

Méfiez-vous des ennemis qui ripostent et des boss puissants ! Vous pouvez éliminer les hordes d'ennemis grâce à différents bonus au choix. Esquivez l'enfer des balles et tirez !"

title: Stickman Archero Fight
description:
Jouez à Stickman Archero Fight. Artisanat, mise à niveau, batailles avec stickman ennemi. Faites tout pour la victoire. Faire la meilleure fatalité. Devenez un pro !

Améliorez votre stickman, combattez les ennemis dans le jeu Stickman Archero. Créez des fatalités cool et dynamiques. Beaucoup de magie et de batailles ! Le jeu est similaire à SupremeDuelistStickman. Combats dans le village avec d'autres stickman.

Appuyez sur les touches W/A/S/D pour vous déplacer. Appuyez sur "E" pour interagir avec les éléments. Appuyez sur le bouton gauche de la souris pour frapper.

title: Tennis Open 2020
description: L'excitation du monde du tennis est prête ! Prenez une raquette et participez à tous les événements de tennis importants du monde ! Pouvez-vous gagner ? Pouvez-vous surmonter tous les obstacles ? Entraînez-vous dur, jouez bien et devenez une légende imbattable. Atteignez le sommet et écrivez l'Histoire. Montrez ce que vous valez et triomphez !

title: Ultimate Strike
description: Ultimate Strike features big arsenal of weapons which consists of twenty seven different guns and intense multiplayer battles across nine highly detailed maps, you spawn with random weapons loadout and your mission is to shoot all rival players in order to win.

title: Football Heads
description: Entrez sur le terrain, décimez votre adversaire avec diverses frappes puissantes et des bonus amusants et décalés. Enfin, montre-lui qui est le boss avec le système d'émoticones - devenez une légende du football aujourd'hui !

title: Real City Driving 2
description: Select different super cars and drive them as fast as you can across the city.

title: My Sweet Candy Outfits
description: Welcome to the My Sweet Candy Outfits. Rainbow high girls Skyler, Sunny, Ruby, and Violet are planning a weekend party. But a party without a theme is not fun! So they planned to be in Sweet candy themes. Help the girls to browse the wardrobe and pick the cute candy outfit for them. Play and have fun!

title: Red and Blue Stickman Rope
description:
Are you ready for the adventure of two very cute brothers, namely blue and red stickman? Brothers red and blue need to get the key and reach the door. Be two people and get them to the door with your friend. reach the door and pass it to the new level. You will face multiple challenges but reach the door.   

How to Play?
*Move to WASD + Arrow Keys                    
*Double Jump available                    
*Mobile Touch Control

title: Moto Maniac 2
description: Overcome all the obstacles as fast as you can. This game is a sequel to Moto Maniac set in a different environment. This time it's a bridge in the night. It's under construction so you have to be careful not to fall into the abyss and not to hit your head. On top of the obstacles on the way, it's dark! Fortunately you have a drone that will light your way.

title: Roll this Ball
description: Vous aimez les jeux de pousse-pousse classiques ? Alors ce jeu est fait pour vous ! Déplacez les tuiles en bois pour vous frayer un chemin et permettre à la boule en acier d'atteindre le but rouge et brillant. Avec ce casse-tête populaire, vous passerez d'agréables moments et vous ferez travailler vos méninges !

title: Funny Bone Surgery
description: Leah went to play stakeboard on the street. But she was distracted and hit a car! She got a nasty broken arm and foot. Help fix her injuries and broken bones!

title: Boxing Stars
description: Passez de la boxe clandestine aux championnats et devenez une star de la boxe. Améliorez vos compétences avec des récompenses pour participer à de meilleurs tournois.

title: Space Tower Defense
description: Tower Defense est un jeu de stratégie où le but du joueur est de protéger ses territoires et la tour principale des attaques ennemies. Pour ce faire, le joueur construit des structures défensives le long de la trajectoire d'attaque, dont la force dépend du coût de l'énergie que le joueur reçoit pour vaincre l'équipement ennemi.

title: Block Puzzle Jewel
description: Le but est de déposer des blocs afin de créer et de détruire des lignes complètes sur l'écran à la fois verticalement et horizontalement. N'oubliez pas d'empêcher les blocs de remplir l'écran dans ce jeu de puzzle addictif.

title: Roar of City
description: Roar of City is a 2D isometric Beat 'em up game with high quality graphic and suitable gameplay for mobile and desktop. Fight with criminals gang and arrest their commander to rescue the city. But now the city is angry and the horrible roar of the city can be heard.

title: Slalom Hero
description: Choose your hero and compete across 3 courses in the Slalom event. Steer between the slalom gates and collect boosts to improve your times. Will you win a Gold Medal? Be a Slalom Hero!

title: Line of Defense
description: Line of Defense is a fun battle of defense against attacking enemy tanks. Using you defensive rockets painted with colors, match it with the color of attacking tanks and shoot in order to destroy it. If the color mismatches, you will lose. If tanks reaches the front line you will lose. Use your defense rockets effectively and watch out for enemy tanks coming from different sides.

title: 2D Platformer Coin
description:
Help the dude collect coins, to win and pass the round !

The game is that you need to collect coins and win the round, Coins are collected by a character, you must pass a series of tests to reach the coins and pick it up, To pass and win you need to collect 8 coins, but you do not think that this is easy. Try and test your skills and mind!

How to play:
Controls: Button-W-jump up,
Button-S-walk down,
Button-D-walk right,
Button-A-walk left,
And if you jump to hold the SPACE button, the character will slowly descend to the ground as if gravity has turned off.

title: Water Sort Puzzle
description:
À propos de ce jeu
Water Sort Puzzle est un jeu de puzzle amusant et addictif! Essayez de trier l’eau colorée dans les verres jusqu’à ce que toutes les couleurs dans le même verre. Un jeu stimulant mais relaxant pour exercer votre cerveau!

★ COMMENT JOUER :
• Tapoter n’importe quel verre pour verser de l’eau dans un autre verre.
• La règle est que vous ne pouvez verser l’eau que si elle est liée à la même couleur et qu’il y a suffisamment d’espace sur le verre.

title: D. Copter Reloaded
description: Reloaded D.Copter is a brand new shooting 3D game. You need to take a helicopter and perform shooting missions!

title: Baby Hazel Birthday Party
description: Hurray! Baby Hazel is celebrating her 3rd birthday. Let us join Hazel to enjoy dancing, feasting and magic shows at her birthday party. On this special occasion, keep Baby Hazel happy by fulfilling all her needs. Someone who is very dear to Hazel has planned a surprise for her to make her birthday more fun-filled. Let us see what the surprise is and who has planned it.

title: 2048 X2 Merge Blocks
description: Une combinaison du jeu classique 2048 et de Tetris. Les nombres descendent et continuent d'affluer. Gérez la fusion des nombres et gardez la zone de jeu dégagée aussi longtemps que possible. Quelle est la meilleure fusion que vous puissiez faire ?

title: KULI
description: Vous revenez d'une ballade en montagne quand vous apprenez qu'une épidémie zombie vient d'avoir lieu. Que faites-vous ? Ce que vous savez faire le mieux pardi! Construire des défenses, les faire évoluer et vous battre! Tenez les zombies à distance et massacrez-en le plus possible grâce à vos tourelles et vos armes défensives, préparez votre stratégie le jour et combattez la nuit. Survivrez-vous à KULI?

title: Boss Level Shootout
description: Gamer boy Billy loved to play video games but one day his retro console ate him. Now Billy is inside the retro style game and must beat the bosses in this ultimate shootout. Test your skills in shooting, running, picking power-ups and be a winner!

title: Warzone Strike
description: Warzone Strike features next gen graphics and big arsenal of weapons which consists of 38 different guns to shoot rival players on various highly detailed maps.

title: Tower Defense
description: Une horde d'horribles monstres attaque votre royaume, bâtissez vos tours rapidement et survivez à toutes les vagues. Si les flèches et les pierres ne suffisent pas, utilisez les éléments à votre avantage et tuez-les tous.

title: Steve AdventureCraft Nether
description:
The nether section of the adventurecraft game, which is full of adventures, has 10 different levels and flying, crying creatures, zombies and many monsters are waiting for you. collect animals they are your friend. hunt monsters they are your enemy. complete the levels and achieve victory!     

How to Play?
*WASD + F / Mobile Touch Control

title: Lipuzz - Water Sort Puzzle
description: You will think a lot and have a lot of fun while playing the Lipuzz game. A great game to exercise memory. The aim of the game is to collect liquids of the same color in a container by transferring the liquids in the containers to each other. The most important rule in the game is that the container you want to pour the liquid into must either be empty or the other container must have the same color liquid. If you can't pass the level in the game, you can get another container from the top menu.

title: Roller Coaster Simulator
description: Roller Coaster Simulator is a realistic 3D simulator game where you have to drive on winding tracks. With stunning 3D graphics, intuitive controls, and addictive mechanics this simulation 3D game is sure to keep to you addicted for hours. Take care of your passengers and make sure your reach the destination safely. Don’t lose your balance as you will be going to shake on the twisty turns and loops. On the way you will cross the murky seas and the gigantic mountains. Just keep equilibrium as it will much needed.

title: Super Drive
description: Super Drive features cool graphics and lots of super cars to drive across the big city crowded with pedestrians, drive as fast as you can and try to perform different stunts on your way.

title: Soccer Hero
description: Choose your hero and compete against 3 fierce opponents in the World Soccer event. Will you win a Gold Medal by scoring all 3 chances? Be a Soccer Hero!

title: BattleBox
description:
Battle Box is ad Idle game where the more you risk, the more you get! Try to collect all the jewels in each level and to memorize their location!
Be careful tough! Under some blocks there is a devil that will hurt you! If you find three of them the game will be over! By the way, you can restore your health if you find a strawberry, so keep an eye on it.

title: Penalty Superstar
description: You are the goalkeeper starting his career from scratch: use power-ups to get better and try to catch the ball. Win all cups and become the champion of all leagues!

title: Pudding Monsters
description: Les monstres sont en mission pour sauver leurs amis d'un propriétaire de frigo sans coœur! Devenir un SUPER MONSTRE ULTIME semble être le meilleur plan…Depuis la table jusqu'aux abords de la maison, pour finir au cœur de la ville – agglutinez ensemble les monstres et sauvez leurs amis!

title: Fidget Spinner Mania
description: Un fidget spinner, c'est quoi ? C'est un jouet sympa qui tourne dans votre main. C'est un jeu très simple, mais le divertissement qu'il procure est sans limite. Le fidget spinner vous aide à vous détendre et à évacuer le stress en quelques tours seulement. Arrêtez de vous ronger les ongles ou de faire tourner votre stylo. C'est un jouet qui permet aux adultes et aux enfants de faire passer le temps. Récupérez tous les différents fidget spinners.

title: Panda Fight
description: Panda Fight is an action game with a drag and drop mechanic. Your main objective is to beat all the levels to save Panda Princess. Collect all the stars scattered throughout the levels to finish the game with 100% success. Save the princess from terrible enemy pandas. A game with colorful and beautiful pixel art graphics! Good fun!

title: Tiny Chick
description:
Tiny Chick is inspired by the conception of“easy-to-play, hard-to-master”, it is not only a simple casual game you can play all the time, but also very challengable. Just tap, hold, and then release, the chick will jump over the pillars!
Although it is easy to play, it will be hard to get high score. Players have to figure out when and where to go so as to make the chick jump over the pillars! The more pillars you can jump over, the more scores you can claim! With the scores, you can unlock more characters!
How long can you persist? How best can you score? Let's wait and see!

title: Stickman Huggy 2
description:
Help the cute blue monster huggy cross paths full of obstacles! stickman huggy must cross the obstacles and reach the finish line. Help him and get him to the finish.  

how to play?
WASD + Mobile Touch Control

title: Baby Hazel At Beach
description: Hurray! This vacation Baby Hazel is glad to be gifted with a beach treat from her mom and dad. Hazel is excited to play under sunny sky with golden sand, swim in blue water of sea, relax and sip exotic drinks and indulge in other beach activities. Play the game to have lots of fun with Baby Hazel at the beach. Help her in packing important accessories and gears and take care of all her needs.

title: Idle Zoo
description: Devenez un riche investisseur et restaurez des zoos à travers le pays. Réparez les habitats naturels d'origine et construisez-en de nouveaux. Découvrez de nouveaux animaux et regardez votre zoo prospérer.

title: Speed Pool King
description: Enfin un jeu de billard frénétique pour mobiles et tablettes! Mettez les boules dans les trous aussi vite que possible, et défiez la montre pour devenir le meilleur!

title: Jigsaw Puzzle
description: Rencontrez des animaux mignons, visitez des endroits inconnus ou découvrez de nouvelles choses. Expérimentez tout cela en jouant confortablement sur votre téléphone. Choisissez la difficulté qui convient à votre rythme et terminez chaque puzzle.

title: Going up
description:
Help a lonely bird to reach its nest. Avoid obstacles and collect coins to unlock new skins.

Touch the screen or Left Click to fly upwards

title: Car Defender
description:
Play, Merge cars, and collect coins to Win Free Coins.
Enjoy the car Defender game where you have to Merge & unlock new cool cars.

How to play:
-Merge two cars of the same level to get higher level cars and defeat your enemies.

Features:
Destroy all of the bosses.
Different car models to be merged!
Simple 1-tap gameplay

title: Go Chicken Go
description: The chickens escaped from their hideous farm and the last obstacle between them and an everlasting life of freedom is a mere highway. Test your cold blood and truck dodging skills. 25 chickens put their lives in your trustworthy hands. Go Chicken Go!

title: The Eggsecutioner
description:
If you don't like eggs, this is the game for you!

Use the mouse or touch the screen to stop the marker in the middle of the bar

title: Zombie Massacre
description: Zombies are invading the wild west! Grab your guns and protect innocent people from those pesky lifeless folk. Upgrade your guns, equip yourself or hire some help. Don't get killed! Outnumbered, but never outgunned!

title: Call of Ops 2
description: Call of Ops 2 features next-gen graphics and big arsenal of weapons to shoot rival players on different maps.

title: Biozombie Outbreak
description: Biozombie Outbreak features intense zombie shooting on the city streets crowded with blood thirsty zombies, use different types of weapons to shoot all incoming zombies and try to survive before the time runs out.

title: Baby Hazel Bathroom Hygiene
description: Its high time for Baby Hazel to learn the importance of bathroom hygiene. If proper hygiene standards are not maintained, Hazel may easily come in contact of germs. Today, Hazel will be learning techniques of bathroom hygiene. Guide her on clearing all the mess, removing clogs in wash basin and cleaning stained bathroom accessories. Keep Hazel healthy by maintaining good personal hygiene so that she is shielded from germ infection.

title: Baby Hazel Ballerina Dance
description: Cheerful morning of Baby Hazel starts with surprise gifts. While having shower, she is given interesting tasks to complete and on winning receives ballerina toys from mom. Another reason for Hazel to be very excited is that she is going to learn ballerina dance. But our little doll is feeling bit nervous and uneasy in her dance class. Can your encourage Hazel and make her comfortable so that she follows the instructions of teacher carefully.

title: Sliding Slide
description:
Enjoy and relax with a classi puzzle game. Six different images with 3 difficulty levels to satisfy the tastes of every players!
Beat your highscores trying to solve the puzzle as fast as you can!

Touch / Click the screen to move the blocks

title: The Lost Joystick
description:
They stole your joystick… but they don’t know who you are!
You will do everything to get it back
In this psychedelic pixel-artish platformer, you have to jump around the levels looking for coins and keys, killing monsters and avoiding traps . Simple as that.

title: Robot Bar - Find the differences
description:
Spot the differences game in a sci-fi environment full of happy robots enjoying their free time in a club.

Try to find all the differences in each picture before the time runs out. Be careful though: Do not touch the screen randomly trying to catch all the differences this way!
If you touch the screen 5 times without touching one of the differences is game over!

title: Ghost Walker
description:
Ghost Walker is a game about a ninja who went on a hunt for reputable bandit leaders. This game will amaze you with cool ninja controls in Slow Motion and dynamism.

Your main task is to destroy the bosses. And whether you will kill their entire team while you go to them or do without bloodshed is your choice.

This is a game in which you will fully feel like an unsurpassed, elusive, super dexterous and strong master of melee weapons.

Key features of the game:
- Dynamic battles in Slow Motion
- Lots of weapons
- Cool assassin skins to choose from
- Lots of bosses and enemies

Try to experience this incredible feeling of elusiveness yourself, defeat all the bandits without a single scratch and become a legend.

title: Your Queen Destiny
description: Quel genre de reine auriez-vous aimé être ? Toutes les reines ne sont pas forcément pleines de beauté, de grâce et de sagesse. Faites le quiz et découvrez quelle reine vous auriez pu être. Peut-être serez-vous une reine gentille, peut être aussi une reine maléfique ? Essayez-vite pour le savoir!

title: King of Thieves
description: Mettez vos talents de voleur à l'épreuve dans ce mélange unique de jeu de plateformes et de jeu multijoueur JcJ. Profitez de cette expérience époustouflante avec King of Thieves, l'un des meilleurs jeux de 2015. Rivalisez avec plus de 24 millions de joueurs dans le monde et créez votre propre clan de voleurs. Introduisez-vous dans le donjon de vos ennemis et volez leurs trésors. Prouvez que vous êtes plus intelligent et plus adroit. REMARQUE : le jeu est très addictif et vous fera inévitablement rencontrer de nouveaux amis.

title: Gold Mine
description: Make riches by collecting gold and diamonds in mines. The bigger the nugget, the more money you earn, stay away from the gallons so you don’t lose money and the stones that end up taking your time. You can find dynamite, use it wisely so you don’t waste time or money. There are 10 levels for fun.

title: Final Freeway
description:
Experience arcade racing over many diverse levels of fast-paced driving fun.
Beat the clock and speed through each goal to proceed to the next stage.
Boasting a diverse range of exciting levels, this popular title has reached #1 on racing game charts for major mobile platforms.

title: Street Freekick 3D
description: Street Freekick 3D takes freekick game in modern city streets. Curve the ball and defeat opponents in hundreds of levels in gorgeous 3D. Play on any of your devices. Just kick the ball in gates and get a score. Very easy to start, but hard to master.

title: Key & Shield 2
description: L'île de Gorlik n'est toujours pas sûre! Un sort a été lancé et a recouvert l'île de rochers alors que vos amis s'y trouvent toujours prisonniers. Attrapez votre bouclier et votre clé et parcourez l'île pour libérer vos amis et en finir une bonne fois pour toute!

title: Get 10
description: Associer des nombres n'a jamais été aussi amusant! Trouvez et connectez les nombres pour obtenir le nombre et score les plus élevés. Chaque nombre plus élevé représente un nouveau défi. Jusqu'où pouvez-vous aller?

title: Penalty Challenge Multiplayer
description:
Penalty Challenge Multiplayer is a HTML5 Sport Game. Select between 32 different team your favorite one. 
You have 5 attempts to pass the goalie and other 5 to save your opponent’s kicks!
It’s all in your hands and feet! 3 Game’s Mode: - Multiplayer mode - Play against the pc - Challenge a friend playing on the same device

title: Drink Drive Survive
description:
Have you ever tried to drive while drunk? If the answer is no, good for you! me neither! So, what about a simulator that shows you the all the issues that a drunken driver has to face?

Use the mouse / or touch the screen to drive the car around

title: Cerkio
description:
Touch the screen at the right time to throw the ball in the white circle.
Repeat it for more than 30 levels and prove yourself you are skilled enough to complete the game!

34 levels
Nice music
Relaxing game
one hand game

title: Jigsaw Collections
description: Jigsaw puzzle is one of the entertaining, educational games that requires perseverance, accuracy, patience, and most importantly - to be attentive to the little things. Online jigsaw puzzles always attract a huge audience of completely different ages. In our game, everyone can find interesting collections for themselves! A game of this kind is an intrigue, a mystery that both an adult and a child would like to unravel. Search and combine the pieces into a single picture. For convenience, you can zoom in or out on the work surface. We wish you only victories!

title: Island Puzzle
description:
WELCOME TO THE FUNNIEST JUNGLE PUZZLE ADVENTURE GAME!

Start an exciting adventure in the cutest jungle puzzle matching game! Help the brave pilot and charming cat Tom survive on a desert island. Restore and decorate different areas in the island, get to the bottom of the secrets it holds, and enjoy the company of amusing in-game characters. What are you waiting for? Indulge yourself and become the hero of a brand new story. Build your dream island for free!

Search for rare and unique artifacts by playing with curious pets, connecting them together in lines as long as possible. Play with little Tom cat, get powerful boosters and help collect precious items!

MATCHING GAME FEATURES:

● CHARMING CHARACTERS: Dive into a fascinating story and play with the cutest animals in the world!
● EXCELLENT GRAPHICS: Feel completely immersed in the fabulous world of jungle in an eye-catching gameplay!
● OUTSTANDING CONNECT 3 MECHANICS: Tired of the classic swap to match games? This connect-based game is something completely new!
● ADORABLE PUZZLE GAME WITH LIVELY BOARD: piece together fruit, 
flowers, water! They will greet you at every turn!

title: Crap Attack
description:
A man, a woman, a date,  and tons and tons of pooh.

You are the miraculous pill that can fix the situation!



        

Try to keep clean the man that swallowed you, and kill all the crap before it is too late!     

Nobody but you can do that! You have only 5 minutes per level to clean the man's intestine and save the date.
                                                                               

ABOUT THE GAME

- 7 Levels full of "crappy monsters" to defeat.

- Two different modes: Story Mode and Crap Hysteria Mode (NOTE: you have to finish the Story Mode to unlock this mode).

- Two endings (with 2 different FMV.)

- Try to finish the game without swear like a trooper (The Crap Hysteria  Mode is REALLY HARD, so we're not responsable of your frustration).

title: Donutosaur 2
description: Help Donutosaur get his donut! Collect candies by changing the shape of Donutosaur and switching the direction of gravity. Donutosaur's friends will be of great help - they can push, pull and destroy objects.

title: Jurassic Run
description: Un voyage d'aventures qui a mal tourné ! Un dinosaure sanguinaire est à vos trousses ! Pas le temps de descendre un rocher et escalader l'autre. Vous devez utiliser le bâton pour passer de l'autre côté. Veillez à ce que le bâton soit de la bonne longueur, sinon vous tomberez ou vous serez mangé ! Et n'oubliez pas de ramasser les œufs de dinosaure pour avoir une deuxième chance.

title: Flow Mania
description: Un jeu de casse-têtes simple mais addictif. Reliez des paires de points colorés avec des tuyaux pour créer du courant entre eux. Vous devez aussi remplir le plateau de jeu de tuyaux. Les tuyaux ne peuvent ni se croiser, ni se chevaucher.

title: Tac Tac Way
description:
Tac Tac Way, the only game who require a personal Zen master to be played.
You are the ball that needs to drive around psychedelic states of consciousness. Be careful to stay on the wall and follow the path as much as you can!

Tap the screen to change the direction or to teleport over lava. If you fall off the edges, you're gone!

How far can you go? Someone will tell you you need no stress and anxiety if you want to succeed in this Zen game, are you calm enough?
Maybe you'll need a personal Zen master to play this game.
Remember, this is not a classic zigzag game!

title: Angry Sharks
description: Le requin a été exposé à des radiations et il a muté. Il flotte dans la mer et mange des poissons. Plus il en mange, plus il grossit. Les gens ont peur de lui et essaient de le détruire. Essayez de survivre à leurs attaques.

title: Red and Green 3
description: red and green 3 is a two player game. An adventurous game for two, depicting the friendship between the red man and the green man, consisting of 10 chapters. collect candies and earn points. watch out for lasers.

title: Pop-Pop Kitties
description: Play a cute puzzle as you pop-pop all the kitties using strategy and reflexes! With 100+ challenging puzzles and adorable kitties this kawaii Match-3 Puzzle Shooter game will charm players for hours. Can you collect all the stars?

title: Robot Police Iron Panther
description: When the monster alien come to attack the earth, there's no body can save us except the police robot. Build your own Iron Panther robot and fight the monster in an epic fighting! It's not finished yet...

title: Open Dune 2
description:
Dune 2 is a Westwood Studios game put together back in 1992, and it's probably best known for being the prototypical RTS, one of the first games to put together all of the elements that later led to the genre that made StarCraft and Command & Conquer so popular. 

This version is authentic. It's a nice trip down memory lane, or maybe just a free introduction to a piece of PC gaming history.

title: Dotto Botto
description:
Dotto Botto is a classic platformer game.

Help Dotto to find his way home and try to beat all the levels!

You will face deadly enemies, weird creatures and hideous obstacles on your way back home, so be careful!

FEATURES

10 Levels full of moving platforms, obstacles, power-ups, spikes, enemies and much more! (not so much more, actually)
2 game endings! (yes, not 1 but 2!!!! unbelievable!!!)
Colorful pixelated graphics

A monstrous Final Boss!
4 Different enemies
Dozens of traps and obstacles!

title: Creative Puzzle
description: Loves coloring? Even puzzles? This game have 32 pictures to satisfy your loves for coloring and puzzles. Play this game to have a blast fun in coloring and puzzles!

title: Princess Nail Art
description: Princess Nail Art is more-games-in-one of manicure and pedicure, just for girls! It's full of tips for all girls and there are lots of colors to paint nails and have fun!

title: Fishing.io
description: Dans ce jeu amusant et facile aux beaux graphismes, vous allez devenir le premier pêcheur à avoir atteint le fond de l'océan. Collectez des poissons et des trésors pour acheter des améliorations de filet de pêche qui vous permettront d'aller plus profondément. Trouvez plus de personnages pris au piège en mer et remplissez votre salle des trophées.

title: Fun Summer Holiday
description: L'été est enfin là! Et que faites-vous quand l'été est là? Vous partez à la Plage? En vacances? Certainement les deux, tout comme Ashley et ses amis, qui veulent passer leur été ensemble mais n'ont pas encore décidé quelles seraient leurs activités nautiques. Aidez Ashley à choisir ses plus beaux maillots de bain et à passer un été de folie!

title: Duelers
description: Sauvez la Princesse du mal absolu qui s'apprête à s'abattre sur le monde ! Dégainez votre épée et venez à bout de tous vos ennemis!

title: Drag me-ow
description:
Drag and drop game where you have to  bring a cat to his beloved cushion without getting killed.

Use the mouse or touch the screen to drag the cat around bring it to its soft pillow

title: Steve Adventurecraft
description:
Hunt down zombies, skeleton men and exploding monsters with Steve, but don't forget the designs, they are your friends. Use with Steve through the gates of kill monsters world to reach victory and finish the game! 20 different levels 3 different monsters and 5 different friends!

How to Play?
WASD + F / Mobile Control Touch

title: Loaf Clicker
description: Loaf clicker est un jeu de clicker dans lequel vous devez collecter des pains. Vous pouvez acheter diverses améliorations pour augmenter votre collection de pains. Débloquez toutes les réalisations et devenez un milliardaire!

title: A Mole in a Hole
description:
Help a forgetful mole to find his way home!
Look at the map and choose the right path!
Go home to your wife before dinner is ready! She'is waiting for you!

Features:
-20 Levels to dig
-10 Achievements to unlock
- Many different ways to die
- Plenty of distractions to avoid
- That's it! This is a game about a mole that digs holes, what else do you want?

title: The Green Mission Inside a Cave
description: The Green Mission Inside a Cave! Buddy is a green cucumber who has an ability to change color. Go through the mysterious cave to find secret recipes. Switch colors to solve puzzles, avoid red enemies and fly on the Buddy Rocket to finish all levels!

title: Red and Green Pumpkin
description:
Slime pumpkins and scary pumpkin monsters are waiting for you in the red and green pumpkin game, the scariest series of the red and green series. be careful, it is the game of the hardest series. You need teamwork. The game is for two players.

How to Play?
*Use "WASD" keys to move red.
*Use "Arrow Keys" keys to move Green.
*Jump twice to jump higher! ( Double Jump available )
*Watch out for monsters, you may die to them.
*Find the key and reach the door!

title: Diggy
description: Diggy is back! Dig all the way to the center of the moon. Collect treasure and upgrade your mining equipment to help you along the way.

title: Octane Racing
description: Vous conduisez une puissante voiture de sport et devez éviter les véhicules adverses aussi longtemps que possible. Faites attention, chaque Crash vous coûtera une vie!

title: Big Shark
description:
Big Shark is a fish-eating game with many challenges. Through each level, you will discover many animals in the ocean.

How to play: Tap on the screen to control the shark avoids bigger fishes and eat smaller fishes. Your shark will grow up when he eats enough food.

Pufferfish, ray, swordfish, whale, killer whale (orca), sunfish, whale shark, electric eel... is waiting for you to discover.

title: Collect the Gift
description: Le père-Noël a des ennuis! C'est déjà le soir de Noël et tous les cadeaux ne sont pas encore prêts..vite, coupez des cordes, utilisez votre fronde et activez des tas de boutons pour l'aider à finir tous les cadeaux à l'heure!

title: Noob Huggy Winter
description:
It is snowing in game 2 of the series and are you up for the adventure of a noob huggy running with a christmas hat on a cold winter day? In this adventure, we must protect ourselves by jumping from dangerous slime and thorns in the snow-covered forest. We have to be careful with the bees, they can sting, if they do, you may die. collect the diamonds, get the key and go through the door. You can nature in a cave or in a forest, but don't give up, go straight to the door!   

How to Play?
WASD" to move & "Arrow Keys" to move         
Mobile Touch Control         
Double jump is active in the game.

title: Cycle Extreme
description:
Take part in a mountain bike downhill racing challenge. 

You control a bicycle rushing down from the mountains. Be careful - the track is very steep, and there are several obstacles and deadly holes ahead. Be careful and finish each of 20 levels as fast as you can to gain 3 stars!
